name: thinking-modes-mcp-server
description: MCP server providing structured thinking modality tools for AI agents — sequential reasoning, polarity mapping, AQAL analysis, shadow work, and Unity multi-system synthesis.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/__tests__/domain-classifier.test.js && node dist/__tests__/problem-structure.test.js && node dist/__tests__/integration.test.js && node dist/__tests__/template-regression.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:performance && npm run test:regression
